After UAT passes: /gsd:complete-milestone or advance to Phase 87 (proposal-event notifications)

human_actions_pending.action: Browser UAT — run all 8 tests in .planning/phases/84-notification-triggers-existing-events/84-UAT.md
human_actions_pending.context: Tests 1–6 require two roles active (e.g. procurement + requestor). Test 7 needs project personnel assigned. Test 8 needs a new user registration attempt.

decisions.decision: batch.update() instead of batch.set(merge:true) for role_config partial nested Firestore writes
decisions.rationale: batch.set(merge:true) does NOT expand dot-notation keys — treats 'permissions.tabs.dashboard.edit' as a literal top-level field name (silent no-op). batch.update() correctly interprets dot-notation as nested field paths. Fixed and committed in 4481569.

decisions.decision: resolveRequestorUid checks requestor_user_id first, falls back to full_name query for legacy MRFs
decisions.rationale: D-02 legacy fallback — older MRFs predate requestor_user_id field; Phase 84 adds the field going forward but legacy MRFs need the name-based lookup.

decisions.decision: NOTIF-12 fires before signOut in register.js
decisions.rationale: D-11/D-14 — Phase 83 Security Rule requires actor_id == request.auth.uid; must fire while user is still authenticated.
D-13 — new user IS the actor; self-exclusion would silence their notification to super_admins. Explicit false overrides default.

decisions.decision: codeless projects/services show in MRF for operations_user/services_user when uid is in personnel_user_ids
decisions.rationale: syncPersonnelToAssignments is skipped for codeless projects (no code to sync); MRF dropdown checks personnel_user_ids directly as fallback.

next_action: Pull v3.3 branch. Open browser at localhost:8000. Run all 8 UAT tests from .planning/phases/84-notification-triggers-existing-events/84-UAT.md. After UAT passes: /gsd:complete-milestone.
context_notes: Phase 84 is fully implemented, code-reviewed, and all fixes committed (working tree clean). The batch.set→batch.update fix for role permission saves is in 4481569. Only remaining work is browser UAT (8 tests) then milestone completion. serviceAccountKey.json and scripts/preprocess.js remain untracked intentionally — do not commit them.
